signatures.label: cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]): string
signatures.documentation: Merges and deduplicates Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge. Accepts strings, arrays, objects, and conditional expressions.

parameters.label: ...inputs
parameters.documentation: One or more class values: strings, arrays of strings, objects with boolean values, or falsy values to be filtered out.

signatures.label: cva(base?: ClassValue, config?: CVAConfig): VariantFunction
signatures.documentation: Creates a class-variance-authority variant function that generates class names based on variant combinations.

parameters.label: base
parameters.documentation: Base class names applied to all variants. Accepts strings or arrays of class values.

parameters.label: config
parameters.documentation: Configuration object containing variants, compoundVariants, and defaultVariants definitions.

signatures.label: buttonVariants({ variant?, size?, className? }): string
signatures.documentation: Generates class names for the Button component based on variant and size options.

parameters.label: variant
parameters.documentation: Visual style variant: 'default' | 'destructive' | 'outline' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'link'.

parameters.label: size
parameters.documentation: Size variant: 'default' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'icon'.

parameters.label: className
parameters.documentation: Additional class names to merge with the variant classes.

signatures.label: useToast(): { toast, dismiss, toasts }
signatures.documentation: Returns the toast API for displaying toast notifications. Provides toast() to create, dismiss() to remove, and toasts array for current state.

signatures.label: toast({ title?, description?, variant?, action?, duration? }): { id, dismiss, update }
signatures.documentation: Displays a toast notification with the given configuration. Returns controls to dismiss or update the toast.

parameters.label: title
parameters.documentation: The title text displayed prominently in the toast.

parameters.label: description
parameters.documentation: Secondary description text displayed below the title.

parameters.label: variant
parameters.documentation: Visual variant: 'default' | 'destructive'.

parameters.label: action
parameters.documentation: A ToastAction element rendered as an action button in the toast.

parameters.label: duration
parameters.documentation: Auto-dismiss duration in milliseconds. Defaults to 5000.

signatures.label: useFormField(): { id, name, formItemId, formDescriptionId, formMessageId, invalid, isDirty, isTouched, error }
signatures.documentation: Returns form field context and state from the nearest FormField provider. Must be used within a FormField component.

signatures.label: useForm<TFieldValues>({ resolver?, defaultValues?, mode?, reValidateMode? }): UseFormReturn<TFieldValues>
signatures.documentation: Initializes a react-hook-form instance with optional schema validation and default values.

parameters.label: resolver
parameters.documentation: Validation resolver function, typically zodResolver(schema) for Zod-based validation.

parameters.label: defaultValues
parameters.documentation: Default values for the form fields matching the schema shape.

parameters.label: mode
parameters.documentation: Validation strategy: 'onBlur' | 'onChange' | 'onSubmit' | 'onTouched' | 'all'. Defaults to 'onSubmit'.

parameters.label: reValidateMode
parameters.documentation: Re-validation strategy after submit: 'onBlur' | 'onChange' | 'onSubmit'. Defaults to 'onChange'.

signatures.label: zodResolver(schema: ZodSchema, schemaOptions?, factoryOptions?): Resolver
signatures.documentation: Creates a react-hook-form resolver from a Zod validation schema for seamless form validation integration.

parameters.label: schema
parameters.documentation: The Zod schema object (e.g. z.object({...})) to validate form submissions against.

parameters.label: schemaOptions
parameters.documentation: Optional Zod parse options like async mode or error mapping.

parameters.label: factoryOptions
parameters.documentation: Optional factory configuration for the resolver behavior.

signatures.label: React.forwardRef<TRef, TProps>(render: (props: TProps, ref: Ref<TRef>) => ReactElement): ForwardRefExoticComponent
signatures.documentation: Creates a component that forwards its ref to a child DOM element or component. Essential for shadcn/ui primitives.

parameters.label: render
parameters.documentation: Render function receiving (props, ref). Must forward the ref to a DOM element or child component.

signatures.label: z.object(shape: ZodRawShape): ZodObject
signatures.documentation: Creates a Zod object schema with the specified shape for form validation.

parameters.label: shape
parameters.documentation: An object mapping field names to Zod type definitions (e.g. { name: z.string(), age: z.number() }).

signatures.label: z.string(): ZodString & { .min(length, message?), .max(length, message?), .email(message?), .url(message?), .regex(pattern, message?) }
signatures.documentation: Creates a Zod string validator with chainable refinement methods for form field validation.

parameters.label: min
parameters.documentation: Minimum string length. Accepts (length: number, message?: string).

parameters.label: max
parameters.documentation: Maximum string length. Accepts (length: number, message?: string).

signatures.label: z.enum(values: [string, ...string[]]): ZodEnum
signatures.documentation: Creates a Zod enum schema that validates against a fixed set of string values.

parameters.label: values
parameters.documentation: A non-empty array of allowed string values (e.g. ['admin', 'user', 'guest']).

signatures.label: FormField<TFieldValues>({ control, name, render }): ReactElement
signatures.documentation: Connects a form field to react-hook-form state management. Wraps form controls with validation and state tracking.

parameters.label: control
parameters.documentation: The form control object from useForm(). Pass form.control.

parameters.label: name
parameters.documentation: The field name path matching the form schema (e.g. 'email', 'address.street').

parameters.label: render
parameters.documentation: Render prop function receiving { field, fieldState, formState } to render the form control.

signatures.label: columns: ColumnDef<TData, TValue>[]
signatures.documentation: Array of column definitions for TanStack Table / shadcn DataTable. Each column defines accessors, headers, cells, and optional sorting/filtering.

parameters.label: accessorKey
parameters.documentation: The key to access row data for this column. Maps to a property on TData.

parameters.label: header
parameters.documentation: Column header content: a string, or a function receiving HeaderContext for custom rendering.

parameters.label: cell
parameters.documentation: Cell renderer: a function receiving CellContext with row data for custom cell content.

signatures.label: DataTable<TData, TValue>({ columns, data, searchKey?, pagination? }): ReactElement
signatures.documentation: Renders a data table using TanStack Table with shadcn/ui styling. Supports sorting, filtering, and pagination.

parameters.label: columns
parameters.documentation: Array of ColumnDef objects defining the table structure and cell rendering.

parameters.label: data
parameters.documentation: Array of data objects to populate the table rows.

parameters.label: searchKey
parameters.documentation: Optional column key to enable text search filtering.

parameters.label: pagination
parameters.documentation: Optional boolean to enable table pagination controls.

signatures.label: clsx(...inputs: ClassValue[]): string
signatures.documentation: Constructs className strings conditionally from various input types. Foundation utility used by cn().

parameters.label: ...inputs
parameters.documentation: One or more class values: strings, numbers, objects with boolean values, arrays, or falsy values.
